articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: beneath the crypto surface
articles.description: Beneath the stalled market, advisors and long-term investors  are quietly building durable crypto allocations and are becoming more comfortable investing in this asset class.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27: A shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
articles.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications are open, but only for three more weeks. Apply by May 27 for your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, $100K equity-free, and more opportunities for major scaling impact. Pre-Series A founders — and anyone who knows a startup worth backing —

articles.title: The $700 million migration: Why Solv Protocol is ditching LayerZero for Chainlink
articles.description: The combined migrations by Solv and Kelp shift nearly $1 billion in assets to Chainlink's CCIP, reflecting an industry "flight to quality."

articles.title: Police arrest SMS blaster crew that sent malicious messages to thousands across Toronto
articles.description: Toronto police said this is the "first known instance" of an SMS blaster being used in Canada.

articles.title: Kalshi confirms $1 billion raise at $22 billion valuation amid prediction market boom
articles.description: Institutional trading volume surged 800% over the past six months on the platform, while annualized trading activity reached $178 billion despite growing regulatory scrutiny.

articles.title: Exhibit at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Get in front of 10,000 decision-makers before space runs out
articles.description: If startup visibility, traction, and real deals matter, you should be on the TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 exhibit floor. Get your 6' exhibit table before your competitor does.

articles.title: India’s first space tech unicorn emerges as Skyroot gears up for orbital launch
articles.description: Skyroot's valuation has more than doubled since 2023 as the Indian rocket startup prepares for the country's first private orbital launch.

articles.title: Aave to overhaul collateral and listing standards after KelpDAO exploit
articles.description: The lending giant is expanding its asset listing criteria beyond financial risk to include cybersecurity and architecture, and wants the rest of DeFi to follow.

articles.title: 銀河系的遙遠倒影？透過 NGC3137 一窺 5,300 萬光年外的星系動力學
articles.description: 首圖這張由美國太空總署哈伯太空望遠鏡拍攝的新照片中，一個閃耀著星團光芒的旋渦星系 NGC3137 成為焦點。這 […]

articles.title: Bitcoin tests Bollinger Bands breakout as creator flips bullish on BTC
articles.description: A related MVRV indicator hit overheated levels last seen before bitcoin's late-2024 push to $100,000.

articles.title: 'JaredfromSubway' bot front runs Vitalik Buterin's $4 token swap with $1 million in volume
articles.description: The Ethereum co-founder, who has spent months campaigning against toxic MEV with proposals for encrypted mempools, just had one of his own swaps front-run and back-run by the network's most notorious sandwich bot.

articles.title: China’s Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets
articles.description: Moonshot's annualized recurring revenue topped $200 million in April, driven by rapid growth in paid subscriptions and API usage.

articles.title: South Korea confirms 22% crypto tax starting January 2027: Report
articles.description: South Korea’s Finance Ministry has reportedly confirmed for the first time that a 22% tax on crypto gains will proceed as scheduled in January 2027.

articles.title: Core Scientific posts $347M loss as AI hosting overtakes Bitcoin mining
articles.description: Core Scientific mined 279 BTC in the quarter, down 45% from a year earlier, while its colocation business became its top revenue source.

articles.title: Consensus Miami Day 3: Real-time coverage and highlights from on the ground
articles.description: It's day three of Consensus Miami 2026 on Thursday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 1.2%, leading index lower
articles.description: Near Protocol (NEAR), down 1% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

articles.title: Bitwise enters tokenization in takeover of Superstate’s $267 million 'carry fund'
articles.description: The crypto asset manager will take over Superstate’s $267 million USCC fund as tokenized investment products gain traction with institutions.

articles.title: Spotify wants to become the home for AI-generated personal audio
articles.description: Users will be able to create a podcast from Codex or Claude Code and import it to Spotify

articles.title: Kraken to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap in $600 million deal: Bloomberg
articles.description: Kraken owner Payward will acquire Hong Kong-based Reap Technologies as the crypto exchange expands its stablecoin and payments infrastructure business in Asia.

articles.title: VanEck’s Sigel sees Bitcoin reaching $1M within five years
articles.description: VanEck’s Matthew Sigel says Bitcoin may reach $1 million in five years, comparing adoption trends to the video game industry’s shift to mainstream use.
